name: Stedi
description: Stedi — Modern EDI infrastructure platform for programmatic B2B document exchange in X12 and EDIFACT formats.

seo.title: Stedi — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Stedi: Stedi — Modern EDI infrastructure platform for programmatic B2B document exchange in X12 and EDIFACT formats.

when_to_use: Modern EDI API for X12 and EDIFACT B2B document exchange
Replacing legacy VAN EDI with developer-friendly REST APIs
Automating 850 purchase orders and 856 ASNs via webhooks
EDI translation and mapping to JSON for modern supply chains
Programmatic B2B trading partner onboarding and management

pros: Modern JSON APIs over legacy X12 and EDIFACT
Excellent developer docs and sandbox experience
cons: Smaller trading partner network than incumbents
Some complex X12 edge cases need manual mapping
Support model thinner than legacy EDI VANs
Still maturing outside healthcare and supply chain
review.verdict: Finally makes EDI feel like a modern API; perfect for developer-led teams, less so for traditional EDI shops.
review.best_for: Engineering teams replacing legacy EDI VANs with programmable infrastructure
review.not_for: Enterprises needing white-glove trading partner onboarding and legacy VAN parity

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
